headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Adley Rutschman leading the offense with a home run and three RBIs. Kyle Bradish earned the win for the Orioles, pitching six strong innings with seven strikeouts and no earned runs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Brooks Kriske, a right-handed pitcher for the Athletics, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The injury occurred on May 13, 2026. Other notable injuries include Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins), Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets), Rhett Lowder (Cincinnati Reds), Drew Pomeranz (Los Angeles Angels), Dylan Beavers (Baltimore Orioles), Grant Wolfram (Baltimore Orioles), and Jacob Wilson (Athletics).

The Arizona Diamondbacks made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. Additionally, the San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Philadelphia Phillies traded right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Adley Rutschman leading the offense with a home run and three RBIs. Kyle Bradish earned the win for the Orioles, pitching six strong innings with seven strikeouts and no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Angels in 2-4 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 2-4 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Parker Messick earning the win after 6.2 innings of work. Zach Neto led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Thrilling 8-7 Win Over Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Cincinnati Reds in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 8-7 victory. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rout Pirates 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Athletics RHP Brooks Kriske Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Athletics right-handed pitcher Brooks Kriske has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The injury occurred on May 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
